⚠️

This quote has been prepared following the departure of the previous tenant from the above property. Damage to the skirting board (caused by the tenant's dog) and both bedside tables has been identified, photographed and documented below. All costs reflect fair-market rates for repair, replacement and disposal.

1

Skirting Board — Dog Damage (Repair & Repaint)

🐾

Skirting Board — Paint & Timber Damage Caused by Tenant's Dog

⚠ Damage Confirmed

The skirting board throughout the property sustained damage attributed to the tenant's dog, including scratching, chewing and scraping of the painted surface, exposing raw timber beneath. The affected sections require filling, sanding, priming and a full repaint to restore the skirting board to its pre-tenancy condition. Photographic evidence captured at end of tenancy is shown below.

📸 Evidence Photo — Skirting Board Paint Damage (Vantage Place, W8 6AQ)

Skirting Board Repair & Full Repaint
Fill damaged sections, sand smooth, prime and repaint all affected skirting — labour & materials included
 Full property £150.00 (ex. VAT)
VAT @ 20%: £30.00
£180.00 inc. VAT
2

Bedside Tables — Replacement (×2)

🛏

Double Bedroom Bedside Tables — Damaged Beyond Repair

⚠ Damaged — Cannot Be Repaired ✓ Like-for-Like Replacement Quoted

Both bedside tables in the double bedroom were found to be significantly damaged at the end of tenancy, with severe deterioration of the outer covering, peeling and structural damage to the drawer fronts and surrounds. The damage is beyond reasonable repair and both units require full replacement.

All amounts shown in the summary are inclusive of VAT at 20%. Skirting repair (£150 ex. VAT = £180 inc. VAT), disposal (£30 ex. VAT = £36 inc. VAT), bedside tables (£289.98 inc. VAT).
The £30.00 disposal charge is exclusive of VAT and may be subject to VAT at the prevailing rate.

Terms & Conditions

  • This quote is valid for 30 days from the date of issue (05 April 2026).
  • All amounts are presented inclusive of VAT at 20%. Skirting board repair is £150.00 ex. VAT (£180.00 inc. VAT). Disposal is £30.00 ex. VAT (£36.00 inc. VAT). Bedside tables are £289.98 inc. VAT.
  • The £30.00 disposal charge is exclusive of VAT and covers the removal of both damaged bedside tables.
  • All damage has been photographically documented at the property following the end of tenancy.
  • Damage costs are recoverable from the former tenant in accordance with the tenancy agreement and deposit scheme rules.
  • Work will commence upon written acceptance and any required deposit.
  • ASA Electrical LTD reserves the right to revise this quote should additional damage be discovered upon commencement of works.
